info.name: Marketplace API
info.description: Full test suite. Set BASE_URL and run Auth first — tokens are auto-saved to collection variables.

exec: // Unique email per run so re-running never hits a duplicate 400
pm.test('200 OK even for unknown email', () => pm.response.to.have.status(200));
// Alice trying to edit testuser's profile — different IDs → 403

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Test Bracket {{productTimestamp}}",
  "description": "A simple test bracket for the postman suite",
  "category": "mechanical",
  "price": 0,
  "isFree": true,
  "thumbnail": "https://via.placeholder.com/400x300",
  "modelFile": "https://files.example.com/test.stl",
  "availableFilaments": ["PLA"]
}
{ "message": "Can you use PETG instead of PLA?" }
{ "message": "I shouldn't be able to do this" }

exec: // testuser deletes their own account — cleans up after the suite
